name: parallel-rebase-agent-worktree-isolation
description: Run multiple rebase agents in parallel without working tree collisions by assigning each agent a dedicated git worktree. Use when: (1) rebasing 50+ PR branches where agents switch branches and interfere with each other, (2) Safety Net hooks block git branch -D or git reset --hard in shared working tree, (3) background agents need isolated git state to avoid checkout conflicts.
